---
name: "Feature request"
about: "Idea for an addition to the kit — new script, new doc, new pattern."
title: "feature — <one-line summary>"
labels: ["feature"]
---

## The idea
One paragraph. What feature, who benefits, why now.

## Use case
A concrete contributor session that would be better with this.

## Sketch
Pseudocode, doc outline, or rough wording. Keep it short — the goal is to start the conversation, not draft the final implementation.

## Out of scope
What this is NOT.

## Notes (optional)
